title: Brainstorming
scope: Idea capture and development — create, browse, and search ideas backed by structured documents, with flowcharts, statuses, priorities, and tags. NOT long-form knowledge docs (the Documents app) — Brainstorming is the idea-development workspace.

specs.title: Capture an idea
specs.behavior: Creating captures a new idea with a status, priority, tags, and a backing structured document.

specs.title: Browse ideas
specs.behavior: Browsing lists captured ideas with their statuses and priorities.

specs.title: Search ideas
specs.behavior: Searching matches ideas by content and tags.

specs.title: Develop an idea
specs.behavior: Developing an idea edits its document and flowchart and updates its status and priority.
